title: honckenya peploides subsp. major
intro: Honckenya peploides subsp. major, also known as sea purslane, is a succulent plant that grows in coastal areas, particularly in Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Honckenya peploides subsp. major include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and salves, to promote skin health and support the immune system.
